since_last: 62% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.94%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC +2.12% · Gold +1.83% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 62% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.94%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.94%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CBRS is the standout at +17.92%
cards.body: Leaders: CBRS +17.92%, SKHY +13.75%, MU +12.17%, TER +12.07%, LEU +9.50%. Laggards: MDB -4.86%, OKTA -4.51%, WDAY -4.11%, CHKP -3.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.08% at $123.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
